events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Bayern Munich

headlines.description: Striker Harry Kane scored twice as Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich eased past visitors Union Berlin 3-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane double sees leaders Bayern win vs. Union

video.headline: Harry Kane scores his 2nd goal for Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane scores his 2nd goal for Bayern) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: Injury-hit Borussia Dortmund came from a goal down to bag a 2-1 victory over second-placed RB Leipzig in the Bundesliga on Saturday, snapping their three-game losing run across all competitions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Decimated Dortmund beat Leipzig to snap losing run

video.headline: Sehrou Guirassy finds the back of the net for Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Sehrou Guirassy finds the back of the net for Borussia Dortmund) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
